headline: Essential Utilities Q1 Earnings Lag, Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: WTRG Q1 EPS misses estimates, but revenues jump to $862M and beat forecasts as merger approvals with American Water Works advance.

headline: Southern Company Q1 Earnings Beat on Rising Power Usage
summary: SO beat Q1 EPS and revenues as weather-normal sales rose, led by a 42% surge in data center usage.

headline: Missouri   American Water   Ranks #1 in J.D. Power 2026 Water Utility Residential Customer Satisfaction Study in Midwest Large Region
summary: Missouri American Water received the J.D. Power award for ranking highest in customer satisfaction among large water utilities in the Midwest according to the J.D. Power 2026 U.S. Water Utility Residential Customer Satisfaction Study. The 2026 study results were announced in a press release issued by J.D. Power on May 6, 2026.

headline: Essential Utilities Marks Drinking Water Week 2026 With Record Infrastructure Investment, Industry-Leading Compliance
summary: BRYN MAWR, Pa., May 08, 2026--Essential Utilities, Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) joins communities across North America in celebrating Drinking Water Week (May 3–9, 2026), the annual observance led by the American Water Works Association (AWWA) that recognizes the critical role safe, clean drinking water plays in public health and quality of life.

headline: A Look At American Water Works Company (AWK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: How American Water Works Company (AWK) Has Been Trading Lately Recent trading in American Water Works Company (AWK) has been mixed, with the stock up 0.4% over the past day but showing a decline over the past month and year. Over the past week, the stock is down about 1.7%, with a month decline of roughly 6.8% and a past 3 months return of about 1.5%. Year to date, the stock is down around 3.2%, and the 1 year total return is a decline of roughly 11%. See our latest analysis for American...
